name: tophub-defou-stanley-combo
description: 自动获取 TopHub 热榜，精选选题，并使用 Defou x Stanley 风格生成爆款内容。
capabilities: Fetches real-time hot topics from TopHub platform
Uses AI to select top 10 topics with viral potential
Generates three content versions per topic (Stanley, Defou, Combo styles)
Creates four engaging hooks for each article
Saves all content as formatted Markdown files
author: wangdefou-dev
securitySummary: All 112 static findings are false positives. The scanner misidentifies template literals as shell backticks, flags standard API usage as network risks, and interprets environment variable access as credential exposure. This is a legitimate content automation tool that makes transparent network calls to public hot list APIs and uses Anthropic API for content generation. No data exfiltration, no malicious patterns, no hidden behavior.
valueStatement: This skill automates viral content creation by fetching trending topics from TopHub and using AI to generate articles in the popular Defou x Stanley style. Save hours of research and writing while producing engaging, shareable content.
userTitle: Generate viral content from hot topics
limitations: Requires Anthropic API key for content generation
Content is in Simplified Chinese only
Generated content requires human review for quality and accuracy
Topics are limited to Chinese-language hot list sources

useCases.title: Batch content creation
useCases.description: Generate a week of social media posts in hours by automating topic discovery and writing.

useCases.title: Trend-based writing
useCases.description: Quickly capitalize on trending topics with fresh, opinionated content in a distinctive style.

useCases.title: Viral campaign素材
useCases.description: Produce large volumes of engaging content素材 for advertising and marketing campaigns.

promptTemplates.title: Basic usage
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the tophub-defou-stanley-combo skill to fetch hot topics and generate viral content.

promptTemplates.title: Custom topics
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate Defou x Stanley style content about [specific topic] instead of fetching from TopHub.

promptTemplates.title: Style tuning
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate content with more T3 (satire) angle and sharper metaphors using the combo workflow.

promptTemplates.title: Batch processing
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the skill to generate 15 topics instead of 10, focusing on psychology and relationships topics.

bestPractices: Always review and edit AI-generated content before publishing to ensure accuracy and brand alignment
Set up your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env file before running the skill
Use the MOCK_MODE=true setting for testing without consuming API credits
antiPatterns: Publishing AI-generated content without human review - authenticity suffers
Using generated content verbatim without adding personal insights or updates
Running the skill too frequently - hot topics become stale quickly

faq.question: What is Defou x Stanley style?
faq.answer: A popular Chinese content style combining minimalist contrarian insights with deep psychological analysis and viral hooks.

faq.question: Does this skill require API keys?
faq.answer: Yes, you need an Anthropic API key in your .env file to generate content. It works in mock mode without one.

faq.question: What languages does it support?
faq.answer: The skill generates content in Simplified Chinese only. Topic sources are from Chinese platforms.

faq.question: How many topics does it process?
faq.answer: By default, it fetches the top 50 trending items and selects the best 10 for content generation.

faq.question: Where are files saved?
faq.answer: Output files are saved to: outputs/defou-stanley-posts/ directory as Markdown files.

faq.question: Can I customize the content style?
faq.answer: The skill generates three versions per topic: Stanley style (viral), Defou style (deep), and Combo style.
